title: The FaunaPhotonics APS – Light sensor
subtitle: L'APS de FaunaPhotonics - Capteur de lumière
description: A guide for a light‐based sensor system in precision Integrated Pest Management for vegetable crops. It explains how the FaunaPhotonics APS detects insect activity on a spray boom in real time, generates heat maps of insect density, and enables targeted spraying to improve efficiency.
